caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, black t-shirt, and silver headphones sits in front of a microphone in a studio setting. He is wearing a gold chain necklace and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" printed in white across the chest. Behind him is a white wall featuring several logos that include a gold star and the words "GRIND HUSTLE," as well as a larger "BOSS TALK 101" logo. To his right, a screen is partially visible. On-screen overlays include a circular logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and a rectangular logo that says "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his left with a focused expression, while his head and posture remain largely static.
